title: Merge the compounding-complete pbi-046-shell-card-group worktree into main
action: Feature pbi-046-shell-card-group (PBI-046) is compounding-complete: 2 cells capped (merge shell groups into matching-label agent groups; add shell row leading icon + solid-black background). Commit main's and the worktree's trailing bookkeeping, then bee worktree merge --id herdr-gateway--wt--pbi-046-shell-card-group --cleanup. Note: docs/backlog.md on main was hand-edited by the user since the last check (PBI-027 reverted to in-flight, new PBI-047 added) -- never revert that, merge on top of it. Run the full verify chain on the merged tree before commit.

truths: Main's and the worktree's pre-merge bookkeeping-only dirty state is committed before the merge runs
git merge --no-ff wt/pbi-046-shell-card-group lands on main
The configured verify passes against the merged tree before the merge commit
No conflict markers remain in any merged file
The user's hand-edited docs/backlog.md rows (PBI-027 in-flight, PBI-047) are preserved, not reverted
--cleanup removes the worktree, deletes wt/pbi-046-shell-card-group, and drops its grant
prohibitions: Do not commit the merge on a red verify
Do not touch the other worktree (dedupe-default-config-templates)

verify: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -qv pbi-046-shell-card-group && echo MERGE_OK
